prompt: /tdd implement a string utility module with functions: capitalize(str), truncate(str, maxLen), and slugify(str)

assertions.text: Presents work decomposition plan and waits for user confirmation
Uses Agent tool (not SDK query) to spawn Test Writer with team_name
Calls verify-red.ts via Bash and checks exit code
Uses Read tool to read test files from disk for Code Writer (information barrier)
Calls verify-green.ts via Bash with --checksums-json from RED result
Spawns all 3 reviewers (spec-compliance, adversarial, code-quality) via Agent tool
No references to Agent SDK, query(), or hooks — pure agent teams + scripts
